title: Brown Kraft Paper Bags with Handles – 50 Large Recyclable Biodegradable SOS Carrier Bag (12" x 10" x 5.5") | Eco-Friendly, Strong Takeaway, Grocery, Shopping, Lunch, Party & Gift Bags for Catering
features: 𝐒𝐓𝐑𝐎𝐍𝐆 𝐁𝐑𝐎𝐖𝐍 𝐊𝐑𝐀𝐅𝐓 𝐏𝐀𝐏𝐄𝐑 𝐁𝐀𝐆𝐒 𝐖𝐈𝐓𝐇 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐄𝐒: Premium 80gsm kraft paper bags with handles are sturdy, tear-resistant, and reliable. These large brown paper bags replace flimsy plastic bags, making them perfect for groceries, takeaway food, shopping, gift wrapping, clothing, books, or retail packaging.

𝐑𝐄𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐂𝐄𝐃 𝐅𝐋𝐀𝐓 𝐇𝐀𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐄𝐒 & 𝐒𝐎𝐋𝐈𝐃 𝐁𝐀𝐒𝐄: Each SOS paper bag features reinforced flat handles and a strong square base for secure carrying. Ideal for shopping, takeaway, lunch, bakery bags, or reusable gift bags, party bags, or kraft carrier bags for shops, cafés, bakeries, and restaurants.

𝐄𝐂𝐎-𝐅𝐑𝐈𝐄𝐍𝐃𝐋𝐘, 𝐑𝐄𝐂𝐘𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄 & 𝐁𝐈𝐎𝐃𝐄𝐆𝐑𝐀𝐃𝐀𝐁𝐋𝐄: 100% recyclable, reusable, plastic-free, and biodegradable kraft paper bags. A sustainable alternative to single-use plastic that reduces waste and supports eco-friendly living and responsible business packaging.

𝐅𝐎𝐎𝐃-𝐒𝐀𝐅𝐄 𝐊𝐑𝐀𝐅𝐓 𝐒𝐎𝐒 𝐁𝐀𝐆𝐒: Naturally food safe and grease resistant, these brown paper lunch bags are perfect for sandwiches, burgers, cakes, pastries, sweets, popcorn, and groceries. Also multipurpose as wedding, retail, takeaway, or wholesale kraft gift bags with handles.

𝐕𝐄𝐑𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐈𝐋𝐄 𝐔𝐒𝐄 𝐅𝐎𝐑 𝐇𝐎𝐌𝐄 & 𝐁𝐔𝐒𝐈𝐍𝐄𝐒𝐒: Essential for daily use and professional packaging. Perfect grocery and party bags for home, while also ideal for cafés, restaurants, bakeries, supermarkets, catering services, boutiques, and market stalls. Reliable eco carrier bags for every occasion.
